scripts.build: npm run build -w @wireguard-ops-cockpit/domain && npm run build -w @wireguard-ops-cockpit/tmux-adapter && npm run build -w @wireguard-ops-cockpit/api && npm run build -w @wireguard-ops-cockpit/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @wireguard-ops-cockpit/api && npm run test -w @wireguard-ops-cockpit/web
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
